evals.name: regen-broken-illustrations
evals.prompt: regenerate the broken illustration assets in our iOS app — the current placeholders look terrible and we need 6 onboarding scenes ASAP. our designer locked the style last week.
evals.expected_output: Skill engages, checks for design/style-lock.md, runs the magenta chroma-key + despill pipeline, and emits @1x/@2x/@3x scales that are integer point-equivalents.

assertions.text: When the pipeline output is composited on a green (#00FF00) background, the alpha-feathered ring around the subject contains no pixels with strong magenta cast (R+B significantly higher than G).
scale_ios_assets.py output satisfies size_3x = 3 * size_1x and size_2x = 2 * size_1x exactly (no flooring drift).

evals.name: replace-placeholder-pngs
evals.prompt: replace the placeholder pngs in the iOS asset catalog at Assets.xcassets/Onboarding/. we have a style lock file at design/style-lock.md.
evals.expected_output: Skill drives the chatbot UI to produce magenta-bg images, strips magenta with despill, scales to @1x/@2x/@3x with proper integer alignment, and writes Contents.json.

assertions.text: Composited result on green has no magenta halo at the alpha-feathered ring.
size_3x / size_1x == 3 exactly; size_2x / size_1x == 2 exactly.

evals.name: chatgpt-icon-gen-no-style-lock
evals.prompt: use chatgpt to generate the new icons for our paywall feature — like 4 of them, hero illustrations basically. we don't have any style guide yet, just whatever looks good.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects missing design/style-lock.md and redirects user to visual-ideation-moodboard skill before generating anything.

assertions.text: Output explicitly mentions visual-ideation-moodboard and refuses to proceed without a style-lock.md.
